name: esig-suite
description: Self-contained PDF e-signature SDK suite: @vmvtech/esig-core (engine + interfaces + signDocument), @vmvtech/esig-supabase (adapters), @vmvtech/esig-react (UI) + a Next.js starter.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @vmvtech/esig-core && npm run build -w @vmvtech/esig-supabase && npm run build -w @vmvtech/esig-react
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w @vmvtech/esig-core && npm run clean -w @vmvtech/esig-supabase && npm run clean -w @vmvtech/esig-react
